subject: FW: audition info yoed
body:
Jeffrey,
FYI TM;s production assistant,  Chris Apostle , has instructed Yoed on how to proceed re these job openings below. Yoed will submit proper resume and materials. Yoed currently in Israel,  but aware of the deadlines.
Chris is available to accompany him on these auditions in the various cities. Yoed needs to first apply as they have requested his info.
Thanks
Joanne
 
-----Original Message----- 
From: Chris Apostle [mailto:chrisapostle@hoffmanentertainment.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, February 12, 2008 11:57 AM 

Here are some orchestras that have cello openings and auditions are 
happening now and in the future. I have discussed with Yoed and instructed him to make his submissions .

Puerto Rico Symphony Orchestra 

Principal Cello Auditions 
April 7, 2008 
San Juan, PR 
9:00AM 

Name, address, phone number and Resume by March 21, 2008 to 

Menda Ithier, personnel manager 
Puerto Rico Symphony Orchestra 
PO BOX 41227 San Juan, PR 00949-1227 
fax 787 726 4009 
info number 787 018 5763 

Pacific Symphony Orchestra 
Section Cello Auditions 
April 15, 2008 
apply online at www.pacificsymphony.org <http://www.pacificsymphony.org/>  or mail one page resume to Pacific Symphony 
Attn; Auditions 
3631 S harbor Blvd. Suite 100 
Santa Ana, CA  92704-6951 

Vancouver Academy of Music 
Artist/Teacher of Cello 
Full time position for September 2008 
submit letter of application along with letters of reference to 

Jerold Gerbrecht, Music Director 
Vancouver Academy of Music 
1270 Chestnut St 
Vancouver, BC V6J4R9 


Montgomery Symphony Orchestra 

Cello Fellowship
Stipend - 30,000 
submit CD of major concerto and least two contrasting compositions suitable 
for recital, resume, names, addresses and email of three references to 

Montgomery Symphony Orchestra 
301 North Hull St 
MOntgomery, AL 36104 
phone 334 240 4004 fax 334 240 4034 

www.montgomerysymphony.org 
Deadline for submission -  March 10, 2008

Atlanta Symphony-TBA first cellist seat

INFO TBA. Audition April -deadline March 15,2008
